series_metadata.series_description: Record containing all information for repack production of drugs. Includes drug name and strength, bottle size, manufacturer, repack date, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 1 year beyond the expiration date of the most recent drug repacked on the form, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 1 year beyond the expiration date of the most recent drug repacked on the form, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
